stemHtml: If an aircraft follows a rhumb line track of 085°TT from the position 86°N, 020°E, it will…

options.a: fly a spiral track to the North Pole.
options.b: follow a small circle track north of the 86°N parallel.
options.c: fly an undetermined track to the north.
options.d: follow a line which lies at first to the north of the 86°N parallel until reaching a point where the longitude has changed by 180°, when it will turn to the south.
